user.title: Searching for Printers...
user.description: Please wait a moment while we scan the network.

pick_device.title: Select a Printer
pick_device.description: Select the FlashForge printer you want to set up from the list below, or choose manual entry.

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description: Please enter your printer's IP address and port manually.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered FlashForge Printer
discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the FlashForge printer discovered at {host}?

abort.no_host_provided: No host was provided by discovery
